text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: That's crazy! Is this even real?

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Unbelievable! First-time contender Maruzensky single-handedly
defeated seven opponents! In an unprecedented fifteen minutes,
she's won!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh no! I couldn't help it—they all came at me at once. Does this
mean... I got a flawless victory, I guess?

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
A-amazing. It wasn't even a match. I mean, everyone thought she'd
win, so... hehe.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: Uh, wait a sec. The whole final round is... already over?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh, really? Well...

text_block_list.name: Finals Contestant
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! I didn't stand a chance! The truth of the world is that war only
leads to... despair!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh no! They were no match for her!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Huh... Maybe that's why Maruzen never participated again after the
first time...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
(That awkwardness when I invited her... It wasn't my imagination. She
must be concerned how the other players will feel.)

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But... it isn't right. Maruzen...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Watermelon, check! Swim floats, check! Wooden bell, check! Heian
period kickball, cheeeeck! Just need to get chips and bananas! Ahhh,
I'm one busy bee!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! They've got some great stuff here! With this and the kickball,
we can play Heian baseball! How proper and refined. ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Please, you've got to help me! I need to make shaved ice with fresh condensed milk for everyone!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hup hup, yup yup, hup yup yuuup! ♪ Oh, McQueen! Finished packing
yet?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: More boxes... Were you out shopping for useless items again? You've been carried away since day one. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You should get a little carried away too, y'know. You're just
sighing all the time.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You said you'd play seriously, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm going to compete seriously. But I have no intention of
fooling around and causing trouble for others.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're going out for fun but won't have fun... For real? The heck are
you even saying?! That's like grilling a fish whole, then cutting it to
bits! What's the point?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Ugh... Stop worrying about me. It's none of your business anyway.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... Golshi... Golshi just... wanted to have lots of fun with you... till
I passed out from joy...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I-I'm not going to change my mind even if you cry!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no! Play with meee! Play solo cat's cradle with meee! Aloe fish
is fun too! Let's go hug a giant squiiid!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, enough! I've had enough of this! Stop being so selfiiish!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Wait uuuup! Just play with meeee!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Agh, Nakayama! I'm terribly sorry for the disturbance.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you've got that right... But I think I can imagine what you're
fighting about.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Nakayama! You've gotta put some sense into her! She won't stop
going on and on about not bothering people—it's so boring!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: And you're being far too selfish!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hah! If you ask me, neither one of you is right.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
This is the perfect time to make a bet. That way, you can settle things
once and for all.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Solve this with a bet? You're right. We're only going in circles
otherwise.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Sounds fun. And the coming event's the perfect way to do it. We'll
solve our mess in the finals. How 'bout it?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This is a good opportunity. Your absurd selfishness has been a
nuisance to me for too long.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship, if I win, you will promise to behave yourself... for a good,
long while!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Fine, I accept your challenge! But if I win, we're doing beach ballet all night! And you'll be the prima ballerina!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, things are starting to heat up.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, everyone's so busy preparing for our trip. ♪ Golshi has some
extra large luggage too!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
And Chiyo's been training so hard... Every one of them seems to be so
excited...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You're right, I am—very much!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's you, Chiyo! Hi there! What a coincidence. Did you come up
for some air too?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: No, I've been looking for you. There's something I want to talk about.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: You see... I watched the videos of old finals. Like the year you won...
